concept: folk wisdom; systems-thinking; noir detective; apologetic
answer: The shadows that seem to envelop us often hold the secrets to our true selves. Embrace the quiet moments, for within them lies the wisdom of the ages. As you navigate the complexities of life, remember that each choice shapes the tapestry of your existence. Allow the darkness to guide you, as it reveals the complexities of character and the depth of human experience. In the stillness, listen to the whispers of truth, for they will illuminate your path and illuminate the faces of those around you. Trust your instincts, and know that even in the darkest alleys,
